goal: Treat medium priority, medium+ priority, high priority, and critical priority as actionable severities in every codex-cli auto-review run.
assumptions: Gemini may emit either bare severity labels or labels with a priority suffix
Low and low priority remain excluded by default
issue_statuses is the shared source for PR comments and stdout JSON
risks: Priority suffix labels can bypass severity filters if normalization is too literal
Inline badge alt text can include priority suffixes independently of image URLs
